description.description: A detailed description of the disease

symptoms.description: A list of symptoms associated with the disease

transmissionMode.description: The way the disease spreads (e.g., airborne, contact, vector)

severity.description: The severity of the disease (e.g., mild, moderate, severe)

treatment.description: Treatment options available for the disease

recommendedProducts.description: An array of recommended products with quantities for treatment or management

productId.description: The ID of the recommended product

quantity.description: The quantity of the product to be used

createdAt.description: The date when the disease record was created

updatedAt.description: The date when the disease record was last updated
